description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof, surrounded by a fenced yard and mature trees at the front. The structure features a prominent garage, a driveway, and a main entryway with a covered porch. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with patio furniture and a barbecue area, suggesting outdoor living space. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes on the ground floor and smaller ones above. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding with contrasting roof shingles. The property is landscaped with shrubs, trees, and paved walkways, giving it a well-maintained residential appearance.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, garage, fenced yard, and landscaped front and back areas. Features include a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway with porch, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage doors, and the row of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, barbecue area, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, additional windows, and the trees at the front corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by columns and decorative landscaping
